falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 equivalent support zone (~5100 adjusted) would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as the prior bottom held above structural lows; this breach confirms distribution, not accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peak near 28; sustained elevation above 35 indicates panic selling absent in the reference pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottom but rather a breakdown into crisis regime

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred during steepening normalization; renewed deepening inversion signals credit stress and recession acceleration that contradicts the cyclical bottom narrative embedded in the 79% pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
